lesson_title: Converting integers between binary and decimal representation

cards.text: To convert binary to decimal, add the value of each bit: bit n has value {{c1::2^n}} if set, or {{c2::0}} if not set.
cards.source: O.4 - Converting integers between binary and decimal representation

cards.question: What is 0b1011 in decimal?
cards.source: O.4 - Converting integers between binary and decimal representation

cards.question: What is 0b1111'0000 in decimal?
cards.source: O.4 - Converting integers between binary and decimal representation

cards.text: To convert decimal to binary, repeatedly {{c1::divide by 2}} and track the {{c2::remainder}}. The remainders in {{c3::reverse order}} form the binary representation.
cards.source: O.4 - Converting integers between binary and decimal representation

cards.front: What are the first 8 powers of 2 (2^0 through 2^7)?
cards.back:
1, 2, 4, 8, 16, 32, 64, 128
(These are the decimal values of 8-bit positions)
cards.source: O.4 - Converting integers between binary and decimal representation

cards.question: What is 13 in binary (8-bit)?
cards.source: O.4 - Converting integers between binary and decimal representation

cards.concept: Step-by-step method to convert decimal to binary
cards.explanation:
To convert decimal number to binary:
  • Divide the number by 2
  • The remainder (0 or 1) is the next binary digit
  • Use the quotient for the next iteration
  • Repeat until quotient is 0
  • Read remainders in reverse order (bottom to top)
cards.source: O.4 - Converting integers between binary and decimal representation

cards.front: What decimal value does a binary number with only bit n set represent?
cards.source: O.4 - Converting integers between binary and decimal representation

cards.question: What is 0b1111'1111 (all 8 bits set) in decimal?
cards.source: O.4 - Converting integers between binary and decimal representation

cards.text: An alternative method to convert decimal to binary is to find the {{c1::largest power of 2}} less than or equal to the number, {{c2::subtract it}}, and repeat with the remainder.
cards.source: O.4 - Converting integers between binary and decimal representation

cards.front: What is the maximum value that can be stored in an n-bit unsigned integer?
cards.source: O.4 - Converting integers between binary and decimal representation

cards.question: What is 0b0101'0101 in decimal?
cards.source: O.4 - Converting integers between binary and decimal representation

cards.text: The binary number 0b{{c1::1000'0000}} represents {{c2::128}} in decimal, which is {{c3::2^7}}.
cards.source: O.4 - Converting integers between binary and decimal representation
